achievements.title: X Marks the KONG
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in every level of Gangplank Galleon in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: Clambering for KONGs
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in every level of Crocodile Cauldron in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: Allen's Swamp KONGs
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in every level of Krem Quay in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: Hit the Target, Win a KONG
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in every level of Krazy Kremland in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: Trick or KONG
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in every level of Gloomy Gulch in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: Keep KONGquest
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in every level of K. Rool's Keep in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: A Krock of KONG
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in the Flying Krock's only level in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: The KONGaceous Period
achievements.description: Collect every KONG letter in every level of the Lost World in a single session
achievements.author: Tiago17

achievements.title: Plundered Pirate Pennies
achievements.description: Receive 75 Kremkoins in Pirate Panic
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Almost the Same Length as the Original Gangplank Galleon
achievements.description: Find every warp barrel in Gangplank Galleon in a single session
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Teleportation Cauldrons
achievements.description: Find every warp barrel in Crocodile Cauldron in a single session
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Kloak's Konstant Kaching
achievements.description: Obtain 6 extra lives with the help of the same Kloak in Barrel Bayou
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Karrot Khute Kanic
achievements.description: Find the letter K in the secret path in Parrot Chute Panic
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Secret Stronghold Stash
achievements.description: Did you know that even Stronghold Showdown has secrets? Find one of them!
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Squawks' Secret Savings
achievements.description: Find 3 Banana Coins in the Brambles section of Animal Antics
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Cranky Did Post-Credits Before It Was Cool
achievements.description: Wait around for a while on the ending screen to hear one last tip
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Eggcellent Dodging
achievements.description: Defeat Krow without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Hot Hook Hop
achievements.description: Defeat Kleever without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: 101st Airborne Kongs
achievements.description: Defeat Kudgel without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Sting Sniper
achievements.description: Defeat King Zing without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Kreepy Korvid Krash
achievements.description: Defeat Kreepy Krow without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Mutiny on the Krock
achievements.description: Defeat Kaptain K. Rool without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Kore Fundamentals
achievements.description: Defeat Kaptain K. Rool in Krocodile Kore without being harmed
achievements.author: Brian

achievements.title: Perpetual Progression
achievements.description: Using only Diddy, finish Pirate Panic while holding right at all times and without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Buccaneer Bowling
achievements.description: Defeat all of the Klingers with a single throw in the second Bonus Room of Mainbrace Mayhem
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Twisted Topsail Treasure
achievements.description: After taking the warp barrel to the top of Topsail Trouble and without using the checkpoint barrel, collect these items in the following order - Blue Balloon, Bonus Coin #2, Single Banana Coin, N, Two Banana Coins, O, Bonus Coin #1, K, G
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Burnt Banana Boycott
achievements.description: Finish Hot-Head Hop while collecting 1 banana or less and without using the checkpoint barrel or the warp barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Kite Keeper Knecky
achievements.description: Receive a Balloon as a reward from the goal in Kannon's Klaim
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Clapperless Cleverness
achievements.description: Finish Lava Lagoon without jumping on Clappers more than four times and without using the checkpoint barrel or the warp barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Harmless Helicopter Hop
achievements.description: Finish Krockhead Klamber without harming any enemy and without using the checkpoint barrel or the Team Up ability
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Banana Bypassing Bounce
achievements.description: Finish Rattle Battle while collecting 9 or less visible bananas and without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Brisk Bramble Blitz
achievements.description: Finish Bramble Blast in less than 2 minutes and 30 seconds without using the checkpoint barrel - pausing the game pauses the timer
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Tantalizing Treats Terror
achievements.description: In Target Terror, collect at least 100 bananas without being harmed by any wall during the race and without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Seamless Scramble Sweep
achievements.description: Finish Bramble Scramble without being harmed and without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Krushing the KONGpetition
achievements.description: In Rickety Race, smash every racer, collect every KONG letter, and finish in first place
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Dynamic Diddy Dink
achievements.description: Using only Diddy, climb the Ghost Ropes and enter the Bonus Barrel in Ghostly Grove
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Hasty Hall Hopper
achievements.description: Finish Haunted Hall without destroying any minus barrels, without entering any Bonus Rooms, and without using any checkpoint barrels
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Briefly Braced Birdie
achievements.description: Finish all of Parrot Chute Panic without being carried by Quawks for more than 2 seconds
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Cautious Castle Cargo
achievements.description: Enter the first Bonus Room in Castle Crush without transforming into Rambi - this is impossible in Hard Mode!
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Chamber Chitin Crusher
achievements.description: Using only Dixie, defeat ten Zingers while you are invincible in Chain Link Chamber
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Diddy's Daring Dive
achievements.description: Using only Diddy, finish the Bonus Room of Screech's Sprint without using the Team Up ability
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Screech's Speedy Stash Snatcher
achievements.description: Starting Screech's Sprint with 94 Banana Coins or less, collect five Banana Coins and four Banana Bunches and then finish the race
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Poison Proof Primate
achievements.description: Beat the third phase of Kaptain K. Rool in K. Rool Duel without taking damage and having been affected by all three of his poisons
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Jungle Jinx Juke
achievements.description: Using only Diddy, finish Jungle Jinx without harming enemies in any way and without using the checkpoint barrel or the Team Up ability
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Don't Forget the Bananas at the Start!
achievements.description: Collect all 198 bananas in Fiery Furnace (not counting the bunch on the goal) without using the checkpoint barrel
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Aerial Antics Acrobat
achievements.description: Finish the Brambles section in Animal Antics without taking damage
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Konklusive K. Rool Kombat
achievements.description: Defeat Kaptain K. Rool in Krocodile Kore after being hit by the first purple poison shot and keep the effect during the entire fight
achievements.author: GalacticSpear

achievements.title: Kwik Kong
achievements.description: Beat the game in less than 1 hour and 20 minutes of in-game time; saving is allowed
achievements.author: Brian
